_comment: Seed rows required in lead_sources before AC5 tests can run. sourceId values are placeholders — the test-env seed script must produce these exact names as ACTIVE rows so EVAL-AC5-01 (dropdown options) can assert on stable display text. 'Discontinued' is inactive and must NOT appear in the dropdown or be accepted server-side, to exercise the 'active only' contract from tech-design Integration Points.
